rationale.fidelity: Cleanly diagnoses the capacity conflation and retains only common-module membership, twelve positions, visitor choice, and expected displayed-set margin.
rationale.managerial_framing: The actor, choice, screen scarcity, and choice-set mechanism are concrete; the opportunity-cost trade-off between candidate products is mostly implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or claimed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels twelve positions as simplifying and identifies congestion reduction as unsupported and extension-dependent.
rationale.overall: A precise capacity diagnosis with no hard failure; only a small deduction because the display-slot trade-off is not fully developed.
